metadata.title: Manager Self-Assessment Tool
metadata.description: A comprehensive self-assessment framework for managers to evaluate their core capabilities and leadership effectiveness
metadata.target_audience: Team Leaders, Middle Management, Senior Managers

values.label: Strongly Disagree
values.description: This does not describe me at all

scoring_methodology.dimension_scoring: Average of all questions within each dimension

good.description: Strong performance with minor areas for improvement

satisfactory.description: Adequate performance with significant room for growth

core_capability_dimensions.title: Leadership & Vision
core_capability_dimensions.description: Ability to set clear direction, inspire others, and drive organizational goals

behavioral_anchors.5: Consistently creates and communicates compelling vision that motivates teams to achieve exceptional results
behavioral_anchors.4: Regularly demonstrates strong leadership and effectively communicates vision to team members
behavioral_anchors.3: Shows adequate leadership skills and can communicate basic vision and goals
behavioral_anchors.2: Occasionally demonstrates leadership qualities but struggles with vision communication
behavioral_anchors.1: Rarely shows leadership initiative and lacks clear vision for team direction

questions.text: I effectively communicate the organization's vision and goals to my team
I inspire and motivate team members to achieve their best performance
I make decisions that align with organizational strategic objectives
I take initiative in identifying and pursuing new opportunities
I effectively lead change initiatives within my area of responsibility

core_capability_dimensions.title: Communication Skills
core_capability_dimensions.description: Effectiveness in verbal, written, and interpersonal communication across all levels

behavioral_anchors.5: Exceptional communicator who adapts style to audience and consistently achieves clear understanding
behavioral_anchors.4: Strong communication skills with ability to convey complex information clearly to most audiences
behavioral_anchors.3: Adequate communication abilities that meet basic requirements in most situations
behavioral_anchors.2: Communication skills that occasionally create misunderstandings or require clarification
behavioral_anchors.1: Poor communication that frequently leads to confusion and misunderstandings

questions.text: I communicate clearly and concisely in both verbal and written formats
I actively listen to understand others' perspectives and concerns
I provide constructive feedback that helps team members improve
I adapt my communication style to different audiences and situations
I facilitate effective meetings and discussions

core_capability_dimensions.title: Team Development & Coaching
core_capability_dimensions.description: Ability to develop team members' skills, provide coaching, and build high-performing teams

behavioral_anchors.5: Exceptional at identifying potential, providing targeted development, and building high-performing teams
behavioral_anchors.4: Strong coaching abilities with good track record of team member development and team performance
behavioral_anchors.3: Adequate coaching skills that support basic team development needs
behavioral_anchors.2: Limited coaching abilities that occasionally help team members grow
behavioral_anchors.1: Minimal focus on team development with little evidence of coaching effectiveness

questions.text: I regularly provide coaching and mentoring to help team members grow
I identify and develop the strengths of each team member
I create development opportunities for my team members
I delegate effectively to build team capabilities
I foster a collaborative and supportive team environment

core_capability_dimensions.title: Decision Making & Problem Solving
core_capability_dimensions.description: Quality of decision-making processes, analytical thinking, and problem-solving capabilities

behavioral_anchors.5: Makes consistently excellent decisions using comprehensive analysis and considers multiple perspectives
behavioral_anchors.4: Generally makes sound decisions with good analytical approach and stakeholder consideration
behavioral_anchors.3: Makes adequate decisions that meet basic requirements with standard analytical methods
behavioral_anchors.2: Decision-making is inconsistent and sometimes lacks proper analysis or stakeholder input
behavioral_anchors.1: Poor decision-making that frequently requires revision or causes problems

questions.text: I analyze problems thoroughly before making decisions
I consider multiple alternatives and their potential consequences
I make timely decisions even with incomplete information
I involve appropriate stakeholders in the decision-making process
I take responsibility for the outcomes of my decisions

core_capability_dimensions.title: Performance Management
core_capability_dimensions.description: Effectiveness in setting expectations, monitoring progress, and managing team performance

behavioral_anchors.5: Exceptional at setting clear expectations, tracking performance, and driving results through effective management
behavioral_anchors.4: Strong performance management with clear expectations and consistent follow-through on results
behavioral_anchors.3: Adequate performance management that meets basic expectations and requirements
behavioral_anchors.2: Inconsistent performance management that sometimes lacks clarity or follow-through
behavioral_anchors.1: Poor performance management with unclear expectations and minimal tracking of results

questions.text: I set clear, measurable goals and expectations for my team
I regularly monitor and track team performance against objectives
I address performance issues promptly and constructively
I recognize and reward good performance appropriately
I conduct effective performance reviews and development discussions

core_capability_dimensions.title: Emotional Intelligence
core_capability_dimensions.description: Self-awareness, empathy, and ability to manage emotions and relationships effectively

behavioral_anchors.5: Demonstrates exceptional self-awareness and empathy, expertly managing emotions and relationships
behavioral_anchors.4: Shows strong emotional intelligence with good self-awareness and relationship management skills
behavioral_anchors.3: Displays adequate emotional intelligence that supports basic interpersonal effectiveness
behavioral_anchors.2: Limited emotional intelligence that occasionally creates interpersonal challenges
behavioral_anchors.1: Poor emotional intelligence that frequently negatively impacts relationships and team dynamics

questions.text: I am aware of my emotions and how they affect others
I manage stress and pressure effectively
I show empathy and understanding toward team members
I remain calm and composed during difficult situations
I build positive relationships across all organizational levels

open_ended_questions.question: What do you consider to be your greatest strengths as a manager? Provide specific examples of how these strengths have positively impacted your team or organization.
open_ended_questions.guidance: Think about specific situations where your management skills made a significant difference. Include measurable outcomes when possible.

open_ended_questions.question: What areas of your management skills do you believe need the most development? What specific steps are you taking or planning to take to improve in these areas?
open_ended_questions.guidance: Be honest about areas for growth and show commitment to continuous improvement with concrete action plans.

open_ended_questions.question: Describe a significant management challenge you faced in the past year. How did you handle it, and what did you learn from the experience?
open_ended_questions.guidance: Focus on your problem-solving approach, decision-making process, and key lessons learned.

open_ended_questions.question: How do you measure the success of your team? Provide examples of achievements or improvements your team has made under your leadership.
open_ended_questions.guidance: Include both quantitative metrics and qualitative improvements in team performance, engagement, or capabilities.

open_ended_questions.question: What are your professional development goals for the next 12 months? How do these align with your organization's objectives?
open_ended_questions.guidance: Demonstrate alignment between personal growth and organizational needs, with specific, achievable goals.

instructions: Set aside 30-45 minutes in a quiet environment for completion
Review your recent performance feedback and 360-degree evaluations if available
Consider gathering input from trusted colleagues or mentors before beginning
Have specific examples and situations ready to reference in your responses

steps: Read each question carefully and consider your typical behavior, not just recent events
Be honest and objective in your self-assessment
Use the behavioral anchors to calibrate your responses
Provide specific examples in the open-ended questions
Review your responses for consistency and completeness before submitting

recommended_actions: Discuss results with your supervisor or mentor
Create a development plan based on identified areas for improvement
Set up regular check-ins to track progress on development goals
Consider additional 360-degree feedback to validate self-assessment
Schedule follow-up assessment in 6-12 months to track progress

system_requirements: JSON parsing capability for assessment data
Database storage for results and historical tracking
data_handling: Store individual responses securely with appropriate access controls
Enable aggregated reporting while maintaining individual privacy
Implement data retention policies in compliance with organizational requirements
Provide audit trails for assessment completion and result access

required_fields: All Likert scale questions must be answered
At least 3 open-ended questions must be completed
Minimum 50 words required for each open-ended response
data_validation: Likert scale responses must be integers between 1 and 5
Open-ended responses must not exceed 500 words each
Assessment must be completed within 7 days of initiation
